mapper.select: SELECT TRIP_REQ_NO, CO_CD, TRIP_DIV, TRIP_TYPE_CDS, TRIP_PLACE, EQUIP_NM, TRIP_PLAN, TRIP_ST_DTM, TRIP_ED_DTM, NIGHT_CNT, DAY_CNT, TRIP_PURPOSE, PAY_AMT_KRW, PAY_AMT_USD, SALES_CNFRM_YN, USER_ID, FN_CM06M01_ID_TO_NM(USER_ID) AS USER_NM, SALES_CNFRM_DT, TRIP_COND_CD, ETC, SPRT_TRFC_YN, SPRT_LDG_YN, SPRT_MEAL_YN, SPRT_ETC_YN, SPRT_ETC_TXT, SPRT_TRFC_TXT, SPRT_MEAL_TXT, SALES_CD, CLNT_CD, CLNT_PJT, FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(CLNT_PJT) AS CLNT_PJT_NM, PM_ID, FN_CM06M01_ID_TO_NM(PM_ID) AS PM_NM, CURR_CD, EXRATE, PAY_DT, PAY_ID, APRV_STS_CD, FILE_TRGT_KEY, CREAT_ID, CREAT_DTTM, UDT_ID, UDT_DTTM FROM TB_PM51M01 WHERE TRIP_REQ_NO = #{tripReqNo}

SELECT '교통비' AS EXP_ITEM_CD, 'KRW' AS CURR_CD, NVL(SUM(NVL(TRAFFIC_AMT, 0)), 0) AS KRW_AMT, 0 AS USD_AMT FROM TB_PM52D02 WHERE TRIP_RPT_NO = (SELECT MAX(TRIP_RPT_NO) FROM TB_PM52M01 WHERE TRIP_REQ_NO = #{tripReqNo}) UNION ALL SELECT '숙박비' AS EXP_ITEM_CD, 'KRW' AS CURR_CD, NVL(SUM(NVL(LODGING_AMT, 0)), 0) AS KRW_AMT, 0 AS USD_AMT FROM TB_PM52D02 WHERE TRIP_RPT_NO = (SELECT MAX(TRIP_RPT_NO) FROM TB_PM52M01 WHERE TRIP_REQ_NO = #{tripReqNo}) UNION ALL SELECT '식대' AS EXP_ITEM_CD, 'KRW' AS CURR_CD, NVL(SUM(NVL(MEAL_AMT, 0)), 0) AS KRW_AMT, 0 AS USD_AMT FROM TB_PM52D02 WHERE TRIP_RPT_NO = (SELECT MAX(TRIP_RPT_NO) FROM TB_PM52M01 WHERE TRIP_REQ_NO = #{tripReqNo}) UNION ALL SELECT '일비' AS EXP_ITEM_CD, 'KRW' AS CURR_CD, NVL(SUM(NVL(DAILY_AMT, 0)), 0) AS KRW_AMT, 0 AS USD_AMT FROM TB_PM52D02 WHERE TRIP_RPT_NO = (SELECT MAX(TRIP_RPT_NO) FROM TB_PM52M01 WHERE TRIP_REQ_NO = #{tripReqNo}) UNION ALL SELECT '특별비' AS EXP_ITEM_CD, 'KRW' AS CURR_CD, NVL(SUM(NVL(SPECIAL_AMT, 0)), 0) AS KRW_AMT, 0 AS USD_AMT FROM TB_PM52D02 WHERE TRIP_RPT_NO = (SELECT MAX(TRIP_RPT_NO) FROM TB_PM52M01 WHERE TRIP_REQ_NO = #{tripReqNo})

SELECT TRIP_REQ_NO, SEQ, USER_ID, DEPT_NM, POSITION_NM, USER_NM, TRIP_ST_DTM, TRIP_ED_DTM, NIGHT_CNT, DAY_CNT, EAT_CNT, TRAFFIC_AMT, LODGING_AMT, MEAL_AMT, DAILY_AMT, SPECIAL_AMT, TOTAL_AMT, ETC FROM TB_PM51D01 WHERE TRIP_REQ_NO = #{tripReqNo} ORDER BY SEQ
SELECT TRIP_REQ_NO, SEQ, EXP_ITEM_CD, CURR_CD, KRW_AMT, USD_AMT, CALC_BASIS, REMARK FROM TB_PM51D02 WHERE TRIP_REQ_NO = #{tripReqNo} ORDER BY SEQ
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'BT' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '-' || LPAD(MOD(TB_PM51M01_SQ01.NEXTVAL, 10000), 4, '0') FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TB_PM51M01 ( TRIP_REQ_NO, CO_CD, TRIP_DIV, TRIP_TYPE_CDS, TRIP_PLACE, EQUIP_NM, TRIP_PLAN, TRIP_ST_DTM, TRIP_ED_DTM, NIGHT_CNT, DAY_CNT, TRIP_PURPOSE, PAY_AMT_KRW, PAY_AMT_USD, SALES_CNFRM_YN, USER_ID, SALES_CNFRM_DT, TRIP_COND_CD, ETC, SPRT_TRFC_YN, SPRT_LDG_YN, SPRT_MEAL_YN, SPRT_ETC_YN, SPRT_ETC_TXT, SPRT_TRFC_TXT, SPRT_MEAL_TXT, SALES_CD, CLNT_CD, CLNT_PJT, PM_ID, CURR_CD, EXRATE, PAY_DT, PAY_ID, APRV_STS_CD, FILE_TRGT_KEY, CREAT_ID, CREAT_PGM, CREAT_DTTM ) VALUES ( #{tripReqNo}, #{coCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tripDiv, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tripTypeCds, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tripPlace, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{equipNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tripPlan, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tripStDtm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tripEdDtm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nightCnt, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{dayCnt, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{tripPurpose, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{payAmtKrw, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{payAmtUsd, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{salesCnfrmYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{reqId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{salesCnfrmDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tripCondCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{etc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sprtTrfcYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sprtLdgYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sprtMealYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sprtEtcYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sprtEtcTxt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sprtTrfcTxt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sprtMealTxt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{salesCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{clntCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{clntPjt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pmId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{currCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{exrate, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{payDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{payId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'APRVSTS01', #{tripReqNo}, #{userId}, #{pgmId}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_PM51M01 SET TRIP_DIV = #{tripDiv, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TRIP_TYPE_CDS = #{tripTypeCds, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TRIP_PLACE = #{tripPlace, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EQUIP_NM = #{equipNm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TRIP_PLAN = #{tripPlan, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TRIP_ST_DTM = #{tripStDtm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TRIP_ED_DTM = #{tripEdDtm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NIGHT_CNT = #{nightCnt, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, DAY_CNT = #{dayCnt, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, TRIP_PURPOSE = #{tripPurpose, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PAY_AMT_KRW = #{payAmtKrw, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, PAY_AMT_USD = #{payAmtUsd, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, SALES_CNFRM_YN = #{salesCnfrmYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USER_ID = #{reqId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SALES_CNFRM_DT = #{salesCnfrmDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TRIP_COND_CD = #{tripCondCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ETC = #{etc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SPRT_TRFC_YN = #{sprtTrfcYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SPRT_LDG_YN = #{sprtLdgYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SPRT_MEAL_YN = #{sprtMealYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SPRT_ETC_YN = #{sprtEtcYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SPRT_ETC_TXT = #{sprtEtcTxt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SPRT_TRFC_TXT = #{sprtTrfcTxt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SPRT_MEAL_TXT = #{sprtMealTxt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SALES_CD = #{salesCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CLNT_CD = #{clntCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CLNT_PJT = #{clntPjt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PM_ID = #{pmId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CURR_CD = #{currCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EXRATE = #{exrate, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, PAY_DT = #{payDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PAY_ID = #{payId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UDT_ID = #{userId}, UDT_PGM = #{pgmId}, UDT_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE TRIP_REQ_NO = #{tripReqNo}

UPDATE TB_PM51M01 SET PAY_AMT_KRW = #{payAmtKrw, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, PAY_AMT_USD = #{payAmtUsd, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, UDT_ID = #{userId}, UDT_PGM = #{pgmId}, UDT_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE TRIP_REQ_NO = #{tripReqNo}
UPDATE TB_PM51M01 SET APRV_STS_CD = #{aprvStsCd}, UDT_ID = #{todoId}, UDT_PGM = 'WB20', UDT_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE TRIP_REQ_NO = #{tripReqNo}
UPDATE TB_PM51M01 SET PAY_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), PAY_ID = #{userId}, UDT_ID = #{userId}, UDT_PGM = #{pgmId}, UDT_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE TRIP_REQ_NO = #{tripReqNo} AND PAY_DT IS NULL
UPDATE TB_PM51M01 SET PAY_DT = NULL, PAY_ID = NULL, UDT_ID = #{userId}, UDT_PGM = #{pgmId}, UDT_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE TRIP_REQ_NO = #{tripReqNo}

UPDATE TB_PM51M01 SET SALES_CNFRM_YN = #{salesCnfrmYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SALES_CNFRM_DT = #{salesCnfrmDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TRIP_COND_CD = #{tripCondCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ETC = #{etc, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SPRT_TRFC_YN = #{sprtTrfcYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SPRT_TRFC_TXT = #{sprtTrfcTxt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SPRT_LDG_YN = #{sprtLdgYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SPRT_MEAL_YN = #{sprtMealYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SPRT_MEAL_TXT = #{sprtMealTxt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SPRT_ETC_YN = #{sprtEtcYn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SPRT_ETC_TXT = #{sprtEtcTxt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UDT_ID = #{userId}, UDT_PGM = #{pgmId}, UDT_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE TRIP_REQ_NO = #{tripReqNo}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM TB_WB20M03 WHERE TODO_NO = #{reqNo} AND SANCTN_STTUS = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM TB_WB20M03 WHERE TODO_NO = #{reqNo} AND TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID IN ('TODODIV2191', 'TODODIV2201') AND SANCTN_STTUS = 'Y'
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TB_WB20M03 WHERE TODO_NO = #{reqNo} AND TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID IN ('TODODIV1191', 'TODODIV2191', 'TODODIV1201', 'TODODIV2201') AND NVL(SANCTN_STTUS, 'N') != 'Y'
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, ROWNUM AS SANCTN_SN, A.* FROM ( SELECT T.* FROM ( SELECT A.CO_CD AS WBS_PLANCO_CD, A.CO_CD, FN_CM05M01_CD_TO_NM(A.CO_CD) WBS_PLANCO_CD_NM, A.ID AS USR_NM, A.EMP_NO, A.NAME, A.TEL_NO, A.EMAIL, B.DEPT_NM AS DT_NM, D.LEVEL_NM AS JIK, 'TODODIV20' AS TODO_DIV1_CODE_ID, '결재' AS GB, C.APP_SEQ AS SANCTN_SN, '' AS SANCTN_STTUS, C.APP_ID AS TODO_ID, '미승인' AS SANCTN_STTUS_NM, 'I' AS FLAG, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY C.APP_NO DESC) AS RNK FROM TB_CM06M01 A LEFT JOIN TB_BM13M01 C ON (A.ID = C.APP_ID) LEFT OUTER JOIN TB_CM07M01 D ON A.LEVEL_CD = D.LEVEL_CD LEFT JOIN TB_CM04M01 B ON (A.DEPT_ID = B.DEPT_ID) WHERE 1 = 1 AND C.ID = #{userId} AND C.APP_DIV = #{appDiv} ORDER BY C.APP_SEQ ASC ) T WHERE 1 = 1 AND T.RNK = 1 ) AS A )
SELECT M.SALES_CD FROM TB_PM52M01 R INNER JOIN TB_PM51M01 M ON M.TRIP_REQ_NO = R.TRIP_REQ_NO WHERE R.TRIP_RPT_NO = #{tripRptNo}

SELECT CASE WHEN D.CURR_CD = 'CURR01' THEN 'KRW' /* 공통코드 CURR: CURR01=원화 */ WHEN D.CURR_CD = 'CURR02' THEN 'USD' /* 공통코드 CURR: CURR02=달러 */ ELSE 'ETC' END AS CURR_CLASS, NVL(SUM(D.TRAFFIC_AMT), 0) AS TRAFFIC_AMT, NVL(SUM(D.CAR_AMT), 0) AS CAR_AMT, NVL(SUM(D.LODGING_AMT), 0) AS LODGING_AMT, NVL(SUM(D.DAILY_AMT), 0) AS DAILY_AMT, NVL(SUM(D.SPECIAL_AMT), 0) AS SPECIAL_AMT FROM TB_PM52M01 R INNER JOIN TB_PM52D01 D ON D.TRIP_RPT_NO = R.TRIP_RPT_NO WHERE R.TRIP_REQ_NO = #{tripReqNo} GROUP BY CASE WHEN D.CURR_CD = 'CURR01' THEN 'KRW' WHEN D.CURR_CD = 'CURR02' THEN 'USD' ELSE 'ETC' END
SELECT NVL(SUM(T.EAT_CNT), 0) FROM TB_PM52M01 R INNER JOIN TB_PM52D02 T ON T.TRIP_RPT_NO = R.TRIP_RPT_NO WHERE R.TRIP_REQ_NO = #{tripReqNo}

SELECT NVL(SUM(T.DAILY_AMT), 0) AS DAILY_AMT_SUM, NVL(SUM(T.LODGING_AMT), 0) AS LODGING_AMT_SUM FROM TB_PM52M01 R INNER JOIN TB_PM52D02 T ON T.TRIP_RPT_NO = R.TRIP_RPT_NO WHERE R.TRIP_REQ_NO = #{tripReqNo}

SELECT USR_NM, TODO_ID, NAME, EMP_NO, TEL_NO, EMAIL, DT_NM, JIK, GB, TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID, FLAG FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT M.ID AS USR_NM, M.ID AS TODO_ID, M.NAME, M.EMP_NO, M.TEL_NO, M.EMAIL, D.DEPT_NM AS DT_NM, L.LEVEL_NM AS JIK, '결재' AS GB, 'TODODIV2200' AS TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID, 'I' AS FLAG, 1 AS SORT_ORD FROM TB_PM52M01 P INNER JOIN TB_PM51M01 R ON R.TRIP_REQ_NO = P.TRIP_REQ_NO INNER JOIN TB_CM06M01 M ON M.ID = R.USER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_CM04M01 D ON D.DEPT_ID = M.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_CM07M01 L ON L.LEVEL_CD = M.LEVEL_CD WHERE P.TRIP_RPT_NO = #{tripRptNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} UNION ALL -- 출장자 본인이 팀장(타인의 APPDIV02 결재자)인 경우 본인을 팀장 결재선에 추가 SELECT DISTINCT M.ID AS USR_NM, M.ID AS TODO_ID, M.NAME, M.EMP_NO, M.TEL_NO, M.EMAIL, D.DEPT_NM AS DT_NM, L.LEVEL_NM AS JIK, '결재' AS GB, 'TODODIV2200' AS TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID, 'I' AS FLAG, 1 AS SORT_ORD FROM TB_PM52M01 P INNER JOIN TB_PM51M01 R ON R.TRIP_REQ_NO = P.TRIP_REQ_NO INNER JOIN TB_BM13M01 B ON B.ID = R.USER_ID AND B.APP_DIV = 'APPDIV02' INNER JOIN TB_CM06M01 M ON M.ID = B.APP_ID LEFT JOIN TB_CM04M01 D ON D.DEPT_ID = M.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_CM07M01 L ON L.LEVEL_CD = M.LEVEL_CD WHERE P.TRIP_RPT_NO = #{tripRptNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR} UNION ALL SELECT M.ID AS USR_NM, M.ID AS TODO_ID, M.NAME, M.EMP_NO, M.TEL_NO, M.EMAIL, D.DEPT_NM AS DT_NM, L.LEVEL_NM AS JIK, '결재' AS GB, 'TODODIV2200' AS TODO_DIV2_CODE_ID, 'I' AS FLAG, 2 AS SORT_ORD FROM TB_CM06M01 M LEFT JOIN TB_CM04M01 D ON D.DEPT_ID = M.DEPT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_CM07M01 L ON L.LEVEL_CD = M.LEVEL_CD WHERE 1 = 0 ) ORDER BY SORT_ORD, NAME

SELECT TRIP_RPT_NO, CO_CD, TRIP_REQ_NO, ACT_ST_DTM, ACT_ED_DTM, TRIP_PURPOSE, TRIP_RESULT, SELF_EVAL_CD, DEPT_EVAL_CD, FINAL_EVAL_CD, SPECIAL_NOTE, EXTEND_RSN, MINUTES_MISS_RSN, ADV_RCV_AMT_KRW, ADV_RCV_AMT_USD, SETTLE_AMT_KRW, SETTLE_AMT_USD, SPRT_EVAL_CD, APRV_EVAL_CD, APRV_STS_CD, FILE_TRGT_KEY, CREAT_ID, CREAT_DTTM, UDT_ID, UDT_DTTM FROM TB_PM52M01 WHERE TRIP_RPT_NO = #{tripRptNo}

SELECT TRIP_RPT_NO, SEQ, USE_DT, USE_DESC, PERSON_CNT, AMT, CURR_CD, LODGING_AMT, DAILY_AMT, SPECIAL_AMT, TRAFFIC_AMT, CAR_AMT, EXP_ITEM_CD, PAY_MTHD_CD, REMARK FROM TB_PM52D01 WHERE TRIP_RPT_NO = #{tripRptNo} ORDER BY SEQ

SELECT TRIP_RPT_NO, SEQ, USER_ID, DEPT_NM, POSITION_NM, USER_NM, TRIP_ST_DTM, TRIP_ED_DTM, NIGHT_CNT, DAY_CNT, EAT_CNT, TRAFFIC_AMT, LODGING_AMT, MEAL_AMT, DAILY_AMT, SPECIAL_AMT, TOTAL_AMT, ETC FROM TB_PM52D02 WHERE TRIP_RPT_NO = #{tripRptNo} ORDER BY SEQ
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'BR' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '-' || LPAD(MOD(TB_PM52M01_SQ01.NEXTVAL, 10000), 4, '0') FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TB_PM52M01 ( TRIP_RPT_NO, CO_CD, TRIP_REQ_NO, ACT_ST_DTM, ACT_ED_DTM, TRIP_PURPOSE, TRIP_RESULT, SELF_EVAL_CD, DEPT_EVAL_CD, FINAL_EVAL_CD, SPECIAL_NOTE, EXTEND_RSN, MINUTES_MISS_RSN, ADV_RCV_AMT_KRW, ADV_RCV_AMT_USD, SETTLE_AMT_KRW, SETTLE_AMT_USD, SPRT_EVAL_CD, APRV_EVAL_CD, APRV_STS_CD, FILE_TRGT_KEY, CREAT_ID, CREAT_PGM, CREAT_DTTM ) VALUES ( #{tripRptNo}, #{coCd}, #{tripReqNo}, #{actStDtm}, #{actEdDtm}, #{tripPurpose}, #{tripResult}, #{selfEvalCd}, #{deptEvalCd}, #{finalEvalCd}, #{specialNote}, #{extendRsn}, #{minutesMissRsn}, #{advRcvAmtKrw}, #{advRcvAmtUsd}, #{settleAmtKrw}, #{settleAmtUsd}, #{sprtEvalCd}, #{aprvEvalCd}, 'APRVSTS01', #{tripRptNo}, #{userId}, #{pgmId}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_PM52M01 SET ACT_ST_DTM = #{actStDtm}, ACT_ED_DTM = #{actEdDtm}, TRIP_PURPOSE = #{tripPurpose}, TRIP_RESULT = #{tripResult}, SELF_EVAL_CD = #{selfEvalCd}, DEPT_EVAL_CD = #{deptEvalCd}, FINAL_EVAL_CD = #{finalEvalCd}, SPECIAL_NOTE = #{specialNote}, EXTEND_RSN = #{extendRsn}, MINUTES_MISS_RSN = #{minutesMissRsn}, ADV_RCV_AMT_KRW = #{advRcvAmtKrw}, ADV_RCV_AMT_USD = #{advRcvAmtUsd}, SETTLE_AMT_KRW = #{settleAmtKrw}, SETTLE_AMT_USD = #{settleAmtUsd}, SPRT_EVAL_CD = #{sprtEvalCd}, APRV_EVAL_CD = #{aprvEvalCd}, UDT_ID = #{userId}, UDT_PGM = #{pgmId}, UDT_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE TRIP_RPT_NO = #{tripRptNo}

UPDATE TB_PM52M01 SET DEPT_EVAL_CD = #{deptEvalCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, APRV_EVAL_CD = #{aprvEvalCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UDT_ID = #{userId}, UDT_PGM = #{pgmId}, UDT_DTTM = SYSDATE WHERE TRIP_RPT_NO = #{tripRptNo}
